subcodes.first_line: O thou who longest for the Kingdom! The Ancient Beauty of Canaan shed tears of blood from his eyes in separation from his Joseph of Egypt, and so profusely [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتاق ملکوت جمال پیر کنعان در فرقت یوسف مصری خون از دیده ببارید و چندان
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
